The query groups by is_mandatory and counts records, ordered by is_mandatory descending to show mandatory (true) first.","sql":"
SELECT 
  is_mandatory,
  COUNT(*) AS count
FROM prerequisites
GROUP BY is_mandatory
ORDER BY is_mandatory DESC

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  is_mandatory,
  COUNT(*) AS count
FROM prerequisites
GROUP BY is_mandatory
ORDER BY is_mandatory DESC
